channel.title: C++ on Awesome Arabic Speakers
channel.description: Recent content in C++ on Awesome Arabic Speakers

item.title: Arabic Competitive Programming
item.description: Arabic Competitive Programming is a channel that focuses on 3 main areas: programming using C++, tips for Computer Science students, and many tutorials about algorithms, data structures, and competitive programming.

item.title: Quran Companion
item.description: Quran Companion is a cross-platform Quran reader and player with recitation download capabilities, verse highlighting, resizable Quran font, and a variety of tafsir books & translations.
